details.note: MenuActionRegistry class with add(), on(), build(), execute(), clear() methods + singleton export
App menu registration — macOS OpenCode menu with app.checkForUpdates and app.relaunch handlers
File menu registration — sessions, projects, window, GitHub PR, close. Includes github.createPullRequest warning handler.
Edit, View, Go, Window menu registrations with all action handlers (webContents ops, window ops). 17 handlers registered.
Help menu registration — docs, support, plugin manager, feedback, bug report. All href/command-based.
Rewrote to build from MenuActionRegistry instead of importing DESKTOP_MENU from @opencode-ai/app. Action dispatch uses menuRegistry.execute() instead of runDesktopMenuAction() with handlers.
Replaced 18-branch hardcoded switch with thin forwarder to MenuActionRegistry. Removed DesktopMenuActionHandlers type and setZoom function (moved to menu-view-window.ts).
